intent.recurringJob: Turn one-sentence video requests into source-aware, renderer-ready, quality-checked video projects.
targetUsers: Creators making English-learning, explainer, person-profile, product, or social videos
Agents that need a reusable video production workflow
finishedOutputs: final video when rendering is executed

layers: governed remote generation and local ASR
private provider task capture and verified asset ingestion
ListenHub-first Chinese narration with exact 向阳乔木 speaker resolution
content-derived image visual bible and continuity gate

narration.speakerResolution: exact current speaker-list match; no silent substitution

images.styleStrategy: derive from subject, audience, era, emotion, platform, and medium
images.continuity: lock subject identity, palette, lighting, lens/composition, texture, and typography in a visual bible

skillDefaultSequence: preview for content, caption, pacing, and composition iteration
standard only for internal or speed-sensitive delivery
final once content is locked and release evidence is required

always: stream, duration, dimensions, frame-rate, pixel-format, and non-empty output
validation.releaseReady: only final + full + verification pass + verified caption font when captions exist
validation.duplicateVerify: Do not run standalone qcut verify after qcut render succeeds for the same output.

performanceWorkflow.fontPolicy: Prefer project fontsDir; otherwise reuse an installed local Noto Sans CJK SC only in the private project cache. Never bundle, upload, or redistribute a font discovered on the user's machine.

measuredBaseline.fixture: 60-second DIG bilingual demo on the development Mac
measuredBaseline.scope: same-machine relative measurements, not a cross-machine performance guarantee

trust.readsLocalAccountState: only through independently installed 33tc and ListenHub adapters when invoked; qcut redacts structured credential fields/URLs and external adapters must not emit unlabelled raw credentials
trust.networkAccess: public media discovery, cited information sources, and explicitly confirmed ListenHub remote operations
trust.writes: generated project outputs and reports only; no-clobber by default, explicit --force for replacement
trust.credentialBoundary: LISTENHUB_API_KEY or the provider credential store only; no API-key CLI argument, logs, manifests, Git, or public task output
trust.uploadBoundary: local references require a distinct --allow-upload confirmation in addition to --yes
trust.vendorBoundary: marswaveai/skills is preserved as a reference-only locked snapshot; nested skills and cola-avatar-pack instructions are quarantined
trust.rollbackBoundary: delete project-private .qiaocut jobs/cache; remove unreferenced generated assets; uninstall dependency via package manager if desired

implemented: SKILL.md routing and runtime instructions
GitHub-ready README
agents/interface.yaml
ClipSeek read-only search adapter
local asset scanner
33tc presence detector
ffmpeg-full doctor
QiaoCut IR plan generator
video ffprobe verifier

qiaocut.timeline.v1 renderer with preview/standard/final profiles, layered validation, bilingual ASS, deterministic score, macOS narration, ducking, one- or two-pass loudness, contact sheet, strict path boundary, and technical verification
project-local content-addressed cache for shot segments, narration cues, and captioned picture masters
automatic reuse of an installed local Noto Sans CJK SC through private project cache without font redistribution
measured 60-second DIG performance evidence for cold and warm preview/standard/final renders
external 33tc adapter delegation without bundled private protocol
exact 78-entry marswaveai/skills snapshot with MIT license, commit/tree lock, content digest, and isolation notice
ListenHub CLI capability and authentication-state detector that never prints credentials
per-request remote-cost gate, separate local-upload gate, API-key argument rejection, and signed-URL display redaction
project-private ListenHub task capture with mode 0600
HTTPS generated-asset downloader with private-address blocking, redirect/size/type/signature checks, atomic hard-link placement, and no-clobber
SHA-256 generated-asset ingest and manifest provenance
Coli local ASR route
file-backed narration engine for downloaded TTS/Voice/Podcast audio

182-assertion dynamically counted mock ListenHub security and integration smoke test, including exact 向阳乔木 lossless narration, auto-ingest provenance, credential-store gates, generalized secret-flag rejection, and mixed-log/storage-URL redaction
trigger eval script
skill validation script
missingEvidence: end-to-end render fixtures for every workflow (one 60-second bilingual hybrid demo and one 1.2-second real file-narration smoke fixture exist)
HTML/Motion/Manim renderer implementations beyond design contract
public GitHub install proof before publishing
official public 33TaiCi API or permission for a bundled zero-install adapter
provider data-retention, training-use, regional-processing, and downstream-deletion evidence
real Coli model transcription and word-alignment evidence
clean-host Linux and Windows render evidence

requiredBeforePublish: final-profile fixture render with full validation and releaseReady=true
